info.name: SanityFlow API
info.description: Complete API documentation for SanityFlow — covers authentication, water management, issues, distributions, beneficiaries, drivers, resources, suppliers, inventory, barcode lookup, blog, forum, and AI endpoints.

request.description: Register a new regular (member) user account. Requires name (min 2 chars), a valid email, and password (min 8 chars). The role defaults to 'member'. The test script automatically saves the returned JWT to {{authToken}}.

Register the admin user account. After registration, the role must be manually updated to 'admin' in the database (the register endpoint always creates accounts with role 'member'). The test script automatically saves the returned JWT to {{adminToken}}.
Login with email and password. The test script automatically saves the returned JWT to {{authToken}}.
Login as an admin user. Saves the token to {{adminToken}}.
Login as a driver user. Saves the token to {{driverToken}}.

item.name: Issues
item.description: Issue tracking for water-related problems. All routes require authentication. Update and Delete require the admin role.

request.description: Retrieve all reported issues. Requires authentication.
Retrieve a single issue by its ID.

body.raw:
{
  "issueType": "Water Quality",
  "description": "Water has a foul smell and is discoloured.",
  "location": "Zone A, Block 3",
  "photo": "https://example.com/photos/issue1.jpg",
  "priority": "High"
}

request.description: Report a new issue. issueType: 'Water Quality' | 'Water Shortage' | 'Infrastructure' | 'Other'. priority: 'Low' | 'Medium' | 'High'.
Update an issue (admin only). status: 'Pending' | 'In Progress' | 'Resolved'.
Permanently delete an issue (admin only).

item.name: Water Sources
item.description: Manage water source infrastructure. All routes require authentication. Create, Update, and Delete require the admin role.

request.description: Retrieve all water sources.
Retrieve a single water source by its ID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Main Borehole",
  "type": "borehole",
  "location": "North District",
  "capacity": 50000,
  "condition": "Good",
  "isActive": true,
  "notes": "Primary supply source for Zone A"
}

request.description: Create a new water source (admin only). type: 'well' | 'tap' | 'borehole'. condition: 'Good' | 'Fair' | 'Poor'.
Update a water source (admin only).
Delete a water source (admin only).

item.name: Water Quality Tests
item.description: Create and manage water quality test results. All routes require authentication. Create, Update, and Delete require admin.

request.description: Retrieve all water quality test records.
Retrieve aggregated analytics for water quality tests.
Retrieve a single water quality test record by ID.
Log a new water quality test result (admin only). status: 'Safe' | 'Unsafe'. pH must be between 0–14.
Update a water quality test record (admin only).
Delete a water quality test record (admin only).

item.name: Distribution Orders
item.description: Manage water/resource distribution orders. Admins manage orders; drivers can view and update delivery status.

request.description: Retrieve all distribution orders. Requires admin or driver role.
Retrieve a single distribution order by ID. Requires admin or driver role.
Create a new distribution order (admin only). resource must be a valid MongoDB ObjectId.
Update a distribution order — assign a driver or update notes (admin only).
Update the delivery status of an order (driver only). status: 'In Transit' | 'Delivered' | 'Failed'.
Delete a distribution order (admin only).

item.name: Beneficiaries
item.description: Manage beneficiary records. No authentication required on these routes.

request.description: Retrieve all beneficiary records.
Retrieve a single beneficiary by their ID.
Register a new beneficiary. eligibilityStatus: 'Active' | 'Inactive'. familySize must be >= 1.
Update beneficiary details. All fields are optional.
Delete a beneficiary record.

item.name: Blog
item.description: Blog post management. Reading is public. Creating, updating, and deleting require admin authentication.

request.description: Retrieve paginated blog posts. Supports filtering by status, tag, and full-text search.
Retrieve a single blog post by its ID.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "The Importance of Clean Water Access",
  "summary": "An overview of the global water crisis and community-driven solutions.",
  "content": "Water is a fundamental human right. In many regions, access to clean water remains a daily struggle...",
  "coverImage": "https://example.com/images/water-blog.jpg",
  "tags": ["water", "health", "community"],
  "status": "Published"
}

request.description: Create a new blog post (admin only). status: 'Draft' | 'Published'. title max 200 chars, summary max 500 chars.
Partially update a blog post (admin only). All fields are optional.
Delete a blog post (admin only).

item.name: Forum
item.description: Community forum with threads and replies. Reading is public. Posting requires authentication. Deleting a thread requires being the thread author.

request.description: Retrieve paginated forum threads. Supports filtering by status, tag, and search.
Retrieve a single forum thread by ID.
Create a new forum thread. Requires authentication. status: 'Open' | 'Closed'.
Update a forum thread. Requires authentication (typically the thread owner or admin).
Delete a forum thread. Only the author of the thread can delete it.
Retrieve all replies for a specific thread.
Post a reply to a forum thread. Requires authentication.
Delete a reply from a forum thread (admin only).

item.name: Drivers
item.description: Manage delivery drivers. No authentication required on these routes.

request.description: Retrieve all driver records.
Retrieve a single driver by their ID.
Register a new driver. availability: 'Active' | 'Inactive'. Password min 8 chars.
Update driver information. All fields are optional.
Delete a driver record.

item.name: Resources
item.description: Manage inventory resources (water containers, pipes, etc.). All routes require authentication.

request.description: Retrieve all resource records.
Retrieve a single resource by its ID.
Create a new resource. supplier must be a valid MongoDB ObjectId.
Update a resource record.
Delete a resource record.

item.name: Suppliers
item.description: Manage supplier records. All routes require authentication.

request.description: Retrieve all supplier records.
Retrieve a single supplier by ID.
Create a new supplier. reliabilityRating is a numeric score. productsSupplied is an array of resource ObjectIds.
Update a supplier record.
Delete a supplier record.

item.name: Inventory Transactions
item.description: Track stock movements (ADD, REMOVE, TRANSFER) for resources. All routes require authentication.

request.description: Retrieve all inventory transaction records.
Retrieve a single transaction by its ID.
Record an inventory transaction. type: 'ADD' | 'REMOVE' | 'TRANSFER'. product and user must be valid MongoDB ObjectIds. quantity >= 1, reason min 3 chars.

item.name: Barcode
item.description: Look up a resource by its barcode value. Requires authentication.

request.description: Look up a resource record by scanning or providing a barcode string. Set the {{barcode}} variable to the barcode value.

item.name: AI
item.description: AI-powered features. Summarize blog posts using an LLM.

request.description: Generate an AI summary of a blog post by its ID using the configured LLM (Groq). No authentication required.
